## What’s in this folder

This folder contains **Aspose.Words** examples related to **comments**. Each example is a standalone `.cs` file.

## Files

- `comments-extract-all-comments-document-only-those-made-particular-author-docx-file.cs`

## How to build

From the repo root:

```bash
dotnet restore
dotnet build
```
